## Summary

- Apply targeted fixes to Neovim config to resolve startup errors (E527/E526) and unsafe/destructive behaviors.
- Changes include: remove broken opt.shada, secure system calls, fix keymaps, unify autocmd handlers, optimize markdown folding, and Windows compatibility fixes.

## Files changed (high level)

- config/.config/nvim/lua/config/options.lua
- config/.config/nvim/lua/config/keymaps.lua
- config/.config/nvim/lua/config/autocmds.lua
- config/.config/nvim/lua/config/markdown-folding.lua
- config/.config/nvim/lua/config/path_navigation.lua
- config/.config/nvim/lua/plugins/workspaces.lua

## Why

- Startup was failing with E527/E526 due to an invalid shada configuration.
- Some mappings and system calls were unsafe or destructive; fixes improve security and cross-platform behavior.

## Validation

- Headless validation run during development: `nvim --headless -c "echo 'Neovim OK'" -c "qa"`
- Recent commits: 460afd8, 685f383

## Notes

- Branch: chore/bump-opencode-ai-plugin-1.14.20 (pushed)
- Target base branch: windows

Please review and merge when ready.
